name: agent-verify
description: Verify reports false or unverified completion claims from coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Reports what coding agents claimed but did not verify.
interface.longDescription: Verify reuses the agent-verify engine to check claims about tests, file changes, and git work, then reports false or inconclusive claims before finalizing an answer.
defaultPrompt: Verify my final claims before answering.
Report what was not actually done.
Check tests, file changes, and git claims.
